Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CIVIL SERVICE AND PENSIONS

Title: Allows Steven Kobie Jackson to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of police officer for the town of Woodstock police department
Summary: Allows Steven Kobie Jackson to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of police officer for the town of Woodstock police department.
ActClause: AN ACT to allow Steven Kobie Jackson to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of police officer for the town of Woodstock police department
